command_template: NOT EXECUTED: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 ns-train splatfacto --data <immutable_processed_tum_root> nerfstudio-data <separately_preregistered_cli_options>
dataparser: nerfstudio-data with explicitly audited orientation_method=none, center_method=none, auto_scale_poses=false
metric_preservation_options: only source-verified parser settings; formal CLI spelling must be frozen in a separate training protocol
viewer_disabled: must be explicitly frozen in future training protocol
